title: LOSE CONTROL
content:
23 June 2023 Spotify drop, simplified chords for guitar and piano. 6/8 
160bpm.
(c) SWIMS Int. under exclusive license to Warner Records Inc.
 
[Intro]
F#m
 
[Verse 1]
F#m                                         A/E
  Something's got a hold of me lately, no I don't know myself anymore
D/F#                                              C#/F
  Feels like the walls are all closin' in and the devil's knockin' at my 
door, whoa
F#m                                                A/E
 Outta my mind, how many times, did I tell you I'm no good at being alone, 
yeah it's
D/F#                                             C#/F
takin' a toll on me, tryin' my best to keep from tearin' the skin off my 
bones, don't you know
 
[Chorus]
F#m            A/E
  I lose con...trol, when you're not
D/F#            C#sus4/F#              C#/F
next to me, I'm fallin' apart right in front of you can't you see
F#m            A/E
  I lose con...trol, when you're not
D/F#                    C#sus4/F#              C#/F
next to me, yeah you're breakin' my heart baby you make a mess of me
 
[Verse 2]
F#m                                   A/E
  Problematic, problem is I want your body like a fiend like a bad habit, bad
 habit's hard to
D/F#                                                     C#sus4/F#
break when I'm with you, yeah I know I could do it on my own but I want that 
real full
C#/F
moon black magic and it takes two
F#m                                A/E
  Problematic, problem is when I'm with you I'm an addict, and I need some
  D/F#                                                           C#sus4/F#
release, my skin in your teeth, can't see the forest through the trees,
                  C#/F
got me down on my knees darlin' please, oh
 
[Chorus]
F#m            A/E
  I lose con...trol, when you're not
D/F#            C#sus4/F#              C#/F
next to me, I'm fallin' apart right in front of you can't you see
F#m            A/E
  I lose con...trol, when you're not
D/F#                    C#sus4/F#              C#/F
next to me, yeah you're breakin' my heart baby you make a mess of me, yeah
 
[Instrumental]
F#m A/E D/F# C#sus4/F# C#/F
 
[Chorus]
F#m            A/E
  I lose con...trol, when you're not
D/F#              C#sus4/F#              C#/F
here with me, I'm fallin' apart right in front of you can't you see
F#m            A/E
  I lose con...trol, when you're not
D/F#                      C#sus4/F#              C#/F
here with me, yeah you're breakin' my heart baby you make a mess of me

X
